title: CVE-2026-35075: Unauthenticated Remote Attack
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-35075 allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to recover a default password, with no patch available. This vulnerability has not been exploited in the wild yet, but its impact is critical due to the potential for unauthorized access. title: CVE-2026-35076: Privilege Escalation
